_description: M365 Copilot readiness relevance per Cloud Explorer result family — oversharing, labeling, DLP, and access governance concerns.

concerns: Over-permissioned users enable Copilot to surface data beyond need-to-know
Missing Conditional Access policies allow Copilot access from unmanaged devices
Stale guest accounts may access Copilot-surfaced content
PIM not enforced for roles with broad data read access
copilot_risks: Copilot inherits the user's full permission set — over-privileged users get over-privileged AI
External/guest users with Copilot licenses can surface internal content
key_checks: Review least-privilege access for Copilot-licensed users
Verify Conditional Access covers Copilot scenarios

concerns: Public or broadly-shared storage containers may be indexed by Copilot
Missing sensitivity labels on stored documents affect Copilot content filtering
SharePoint/OneDrive connected storage inherits sharing permissions
copilot_risks: Copilot can surface content from any storage the user has read access to
Unlabeled sensitive files are treated as unrestricted
key_checks: Verify sensitivity labels on document libraries

concerns: Missing DLP policies allow sensitive data to flow through Copilot responses
No information barriers may allow cross-departmental data leakage via Copilot
Retention policies must cover Copilot interaction logs
copilot_risks: Without DLP, Copilot can include regulated data (PII, PHI) in responses
Missing retention policies create compliance gaps for Copilot audit trails
key_checks: Verify DLP policies cover Copilot-enabled workloads

concerns: Defender for Cloud Apps should monitor Copilot usage patterns
Alert rules should cover anomalous Copilot data access patterns
copilot_risks: Copilot usage bypasses traditional DLP detection if not explicitly configured
key_checks: Verify Defender for Cloud Apps Copilot integration

concerns: Custom Copilot plugins and agents inherit user permissions
Copilot Studio agents may access data beyond intended scope
Missing DLP policies on Copilot connectors enable data leakage
copilot_risks: Custom agents extend Copilot's reach to external data sources
Plugin permissions are additive to user permissions
key_checks: Verify DLP policies on Power Platform connectors

concerns: Apps with Copilot integrations (Graph connectors) expand searchable content
M365 app registrations with broad Graph API scopes affect Copilot data access
copilot_risks: Graph connectors make external data searchable by Copilot
